title: Kansas Bill Proposes 5-Cent Tax Credit for Higher Ethanol Blends from 2026 to 2031
content: The proposed Kansas bill, HB 2012, outlines a tax credit for retail dealers and distributors selling higher ethanol blends (15%-85% ethanol) from 2026 to 2031. Retail dealers and distributors can claim a $0.05 per gallon credit, capped at $5 million per year. Unused credits can be carried forward for up to five years, but the credit is non-refundable.
author: Analysts Account
